channel.title: Mystery on the KING's Scribe, 7
channel.description: Recent content in Mystery on the KING's Scribe, 7

item.title: Go God Man
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Many are they who stop at beingmerely man; will you become GODMan?

GOD speaks forth, “calling into being, what He has imagined. "
His Spirit, accomplishes (incubation) it.
It is finished. Done. Made MANIFEST.

GodMAN fellowships with GOD’s word (seed)
The Word bears fruit in the man.
By this, GOD.FAITH, 👇🏽

GodMAN speaks forth, “calling into being, what his zedek heart has imagined. "
the words, being of zedek heart = “in Jesus name”
His resting-Spirit {QAVAH} incubates it.
It is finished. Done. Made MANIFEST.

GodMAN operates, and is fruitful,
by GOD’s Word and Spirit.

Jesus is GOD’s Word, given physical expression.
What GOD’s spoken thoughts look like.

If a MAN would become full-stature GodMAN, it must be by:

abiding in God’s Spirit and TRUTH
being immersed (steeped) in GOD’s Word and
being immersed in; and filled evermore, with GOD’s Spirit.

GOD’s Spirit is TRUTH.
GOD’s Word is TRUTH.
To abide/ have the Word dwell richly in me = To be filled with the Holy Spirit
